title: Homepage hero content renders
description: Verify the public landing page loads the main hero copy and primary call to action.

steps.description: Verify text "Build the future on Hedera" is visible
Verify text "tooling for building trusted Hedera apps" is visible

title: Homepage demo tabs switch code examples
description: Verify the homepage demo tabs surface switches between framework or SDK examples and updates the visible code sample.

title: Showcase unauthenticated state exposes submit guardrail
description: Verify the showcase page renders its main discovery UI and keeps submission gated when no wallet session is present.

title: Showcase search updates URL query state
description: Verify typing in the showcase search field updates the URL with the real query parameter used by the app and keeps the results view stable.

steps.description: Type "wallet" into the field with placeholder "Search..."

title: Showcase open-source toggle persists in URL state
description: Verify toggling the Open Source filter updates route state without breaking the page.

steps.description: Click on the switch labeled "Open Source"

title: Showcase empty-state messaging appears for no-match queries
description: Verify an intentionally rare search query renders the real empty-state copy instead of a broken or blank page.

steps.description: Type "zzzzzz-nonexistent-project" into the field with placeholder "Search..."
Verify text "No public projects match the current filters." is visible

title: Missing showcase slug renders not-found state and recovery path
description: Verify a nonexistent showcase slug returns a clear not-found page with a working way back to the index.

steps.description: Verify text "Project not found." is visible
Verify element "Back to Showcase" is visible

title: Existing showcase card opens detail page with core sections
description: Verify the first available showcase card opens a detail page that includes the stable detail sections exposed by the UI.

steps.description: Click on the first visible project card

title: Ecosystem page exposes major explanatory sections
description: Verify the ecosystem page renders its major content sections that explain how Hieco fits into the broader stack.

steps.description: Verify text "What Hieco Is" is visible
Verify text "What the Hedera Network Is" is visible
Verify text "How the Pieces Fit Together" is visible

title: WalletConnect enablement changes across deterministic wallet scenarios
description: Verify the package harness reflects WalletConnect disabled by default and enabled when the configured project-id scenario is selected.

steps.description: Verify text "Wallet State Scenarios" is visible
Select "Configured project ID enables WalletConnect" from the Scenario select in the wallet section

title: Mixed wallet availability shows installed and unavailable wallet names
description: Verify the wallet package harness exposes both installed and unavailable wallet states through real public helpers.

steps.description: Select "Mixed installed and unavailable wallets" from the Scenario select in the wallet section

title: SDK error scenarios expose classification and unwrap failure details
description: Verify the SDK harness exposes meaningful configuration-error and unwrap-error outputs without depending on live network calls.

steps.description: Verify text "Error And Result Handling" is visible
Select "Configuration validation failure" from the Scenario select in the SDK section
Verify text "Use the format shard.realm.num" is visible
Select "unwrap() throws on err()" from the Scenario select in the SDK section
Verify text "Invalid operator account id: not-an-id" is visible

title: Utility validation updates for invalid entity IDs and missing custom networks
description: Verify the utility harness reflects invalid entity input and throws the expected required-network error for an unknown custom network.

steps.description: Clear the Entity ID input and type "not-an-entity"
Verify text "Invalid Hedera entity ID" is visible
Select "Missing custom network" from the Network lookup select
Verify text "Required URL result" is visible
Verify text "Unknown custom network \"missing\". Add it to config.networks before using it." is visible

title: Mirror override URL is reflected in derived client configuration
description: Verify the mirror package harness reflects an overridden base URL without making a live network request.

steps.description: Clear the Override base URL input and type "https://example.com/mirror"
Verify text "Override base URL" is visible

title: Realtime pre-connect guard fails fast before a pool is connected
description: Verify the realtime harness returns the expected not-connected guard result before any relay connection exists.
